text: You find a suspicious object on the deck. Which action will you take?

options.text: Open it up to check the contents yourself
Leave it and check it during the next watch change

explanation: Discovering a suspicious object requires immediate action and adherence to the Ship Security Plan (SSP). The priority is to inform the Master immediately, who will then assess the situation and initiate appropriate responses, which may include isolating the area and calling for expert assistance. Unauthorized handling is dangerous.
